results.notes: Empty overrides -> must reproduce v8 baseline.
Loosen Stage-2 p90 gate from 0.84 to 0.80 -> may keep darkTest tracks alive.
Tighten p90 -- expected to hurt low-light clips.
Loosen Stage-2 mean-conf gate.
Allow shorter post-merge survivors (helps reentries on dark/love).
Slightly tighter -> sanity check.
Loosen id-merge spatial gate -> more bridging on darkTest.
Aggressive long-gap bridging.
Loosen ReID gate (default 0.7) -> bridge more on dark.
Stricter -> may reduce IDS.
Even more permissive pre-merge length.
Loosen the per-detection conf gate inside Stage-1.
Allow longer interpolation gaps (recovers brief darkTest dropouts).
Disable size smoother to see if it hurts loveTest/darkTest scale jumps.
Disable center smoother.
Disable long-gap stitch.
Disable post-merge AND-gate -> expected to be noisier but useful FN check.
Dark-friendly combo: looser p90 + looser ReID + larger id-merge gap.
Even more permissive -- targeted at darkTest survival.
Permissive lengths but KEEP strict ReID (0.75) to stop swaps.
